The '''hyperspace pulsemass generator''' was an experimental [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] weapon developed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Description==
Developed by the [[Imperial Department of Military Research/Legends|IDMR]], the hyperspace pulsemass generator worked by creating tiny spheres of [[hyperenergy]] and scattering them over a region of [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. If a [[Starship/Legends|ship]] traveled through the area the generator was affecting, the hyperenergy spheres would quickly overwhelm its [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]] and destroy the ship.

While effective, the flaw in the technology was that the hyperenergy spheres had a life span of only minutes and would dissipate quickly. This limited the device's use greatly, although efforts were made by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientists]] to improve upon the technology.
